title: agrostis filiformis
intro: Agrostis filiformis, also known as red fescue grass, is a species of grass that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis filiformis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Agrostis filiformis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
